subject: session date
fact: The session occurs on December 7th, 2025.

subject: distance to The Waydown
fact: The Waydown is a half-day's journey from Hillsfar.

subject: soldier count at The Waydown
fact: Two nervous soldiers guard the entrance to The Waydown.

subject: Red Plumes contingent
fact: A larger contingent of the Red Plumes returned to the city with their commander.
source_quote: with a larger contingent of the Red Plumes

subject: Red Plumes patrol frequency
fact: A patrol used to go down once a day to clear the area.
source_quote: a patrol used to go down once a day

subject: sinkhole depth
fact: The underground river is one hundred feet below the sinkhole entrance.

subject: journey to Howling Pits duration
fact: The journey to the Howling Pits takes approximately two days.

subject: Owlbear gloves cost
fact: Crafting the magical gloves for the Owlbear costs one hundred gold pieces.

subject: Goggles of Night cost
fact: Daein purchases Goggles of Night for two hundred gold pieces.

subject: fire giant count
fact: Two massive fire giants ambush the party.

subject: Felkur catapult damage
fact: Felkur's Catapult spell deals only four points of damage to a fire giant.
source_quote: dealing only four points of damage

subject: Daein protective field reduction
fact: Daein's Protective Field reaction reduces damage to Bramgrim by four points.
source_quote: reduce the damage to Bramgrim by four points

subject: Owlbear damage to giant
fact: The Owlbear lands one hit on the first giant for eighteen points of damage.
source_quote: landing one hit for eighteen points of damage

subject: Bramgrim critical hit damage
fact: A fire giant critically strikes Bramgrim, dealing seventy-four points of damage.

subject: Bramgrim short rest healing
fact: Bramgrim regains forty-one hit points during a short rest.

subject: Felkur stealth failure
fact: Felkur rolls a natural one on his stealth check.

subject: Akritas and Daein initiative rolls
fact: Akritas and Daein both roll natural twenties on initiative.
source_quote: both roll natural twenties on initiative

subject: tunnel width
fact: The tunnels vary between ten to thirty feet wide.

subject: ceiling height
fact: The ceilings in the tunnel section are just as tall as the width, at least twenty feet.
source_quote: ceilings just as tall, and the area is at least twenty feet wide

subject: river width
fact: The underground river is fifteen feet wide.
